targets.queryText: SELECT as_of_date_local AS date, ROUND(market_value, 0) AS mv, ROUND(net_liquidation_value, 0) AS nlv, ROUND(ltv_pct, 1) AS ltv, ROUND(projected_monthly_income, 0) AS income, UPPER(risk_quality_category) AS risk, currently_in_drawdown AS in_dd FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-30 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT as_of_date_local AS date, ROUND(market_value, 0) AS mv, ROUND(net_liquidation_value, 0) AS nlv, ROUND(ltv_pct, 1) AS ltv, ROUND(projected_monthly_income, 0) AS income, UPPER(risk_quality_category) AS risk, currently_in_drawdown AS in_dd FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-30 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC;

targets.queryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, market_value AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-30 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, market_value AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-30 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;

targets.queryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, ltv_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-30 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, ltv_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-30 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;
